## Scope

- [ ] Frontend changes (`src/**`, root Next config/files)
- [ ] Backend changes (`backend-api/**`)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Backend syntax/lint checks pass
- [ ] API contract changes documented (if any)

## Release Safety

- [ ] No mock-only fallback introduced for production paths
- [ ] Deploy impact checked:
  - [ ] cPanel backend deploy path
  - [ ] Tencent Edge frontend deploy trigger
